page_metadata.biotools__summary: CALLR is a semi-supervised cell type annotation method for scRNA-seq data. It requires a small number of cell type labels, and annotate the remaining cells by combining clustering and sparse logistic regression.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CALLR is a semi-supervised cell type annotation method for scRNA-seq data. It requires a small number of cell type labels, and annotate the remaining cells by combining clustering and sparse logistic regression.
